perception.visual: large shape in low light, face close, eyes looking directly — recognisable before the word existed
perception.auditory: low, unhurried voice — sound before meaning, rhythm before language
perception.tactile: lifted, held, pressure distributed — the first experience of being fully supported
perception.olfactory: warm, specific, already familiar — a smell that predates memory

interpretation.meaning: safety is a person — not a place or an object; this entity is the environment; all other meanings will be measured against this first one
